task_context.actionable_question: What should admin do for this student in the next 7 days?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Synthesise all [FE] signals into 3–5 admin actions ranked by urgency. Specify who should act (tutor / admin / counsellor) and by when.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The prioritized actions aim to address the student's academic risk and submission challenges through targeted interventions. Each action is supported by specific evidence to ensure a structured approach to student support.

Insights: High Risk Profile Identified: The student has a high at-risk label with a composite risk score of 3, indicating significant academic concerns that necessitate immediate attention. | Submission Support Required: The student's punctuality rate is recorded at 0, indicating a lack of timely submissions, which necessitates the creation of a submission support plan. | Assessment Performance Trend: The student's performance trend shows a negative slope of -0.71875, suggesting a decline in assessment performance that requires review and follow-up.

Warnings: Conflicting evidence is preserved; actions must be phrased with uncertainty and must not hide this conflict.

explanation.summary: The prioritized actions aim to address the student's academic risk and submission challenges through targeted interventions. Each action is supported by specific evidence to ensure a structured approach to student support.

insights.title: High Risk Profile Identified
insights.description: The student has a high at-risk label with a composite risk score of 3, indicating significant academic concerns that necessitate immediate attention.

evidence.context: The student is categorized as high risk.
The risk label confirms the need for intervention.

insights.title: Submission Support Required
insights.description: The student's punctuality rate is recorded at 0, indicating a lack of timely submissions, which necessitates the creation of a submission support plan.

evidence.context: This value indicates no timely submissions.

insights.title: Assessment Performance Trend
insights.description: The student's performance trend shows a negative slope of -0.71875, suggesting a decline in assessment performance that requires review and follow-up.

evidence.context: This trend indicates a potential decline in academic performance.

warnings: Conflicting evidence is preserved; actions must be phrased with uncertainty and must not hide this conflict.

confidence.reason: The evidence used to support the actions is complete and directly linked to the identified risks and needs of the student.

v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (11.8049 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain the supported admin actions already generated or exposed by the action_synthesis rule contract and rank/describe them by urgency when priority evidence is supplied.
For each supported admin action that is present, specify who should act and by when when owner/time-horizon evidence is supplied.

evaluation_constraints.description: Every explained or proposed action and urgency level must reference returned feature-engineered signals or the supplied action-rule contract.
Do not invent urgency, owner, time horizon, or additional actions that are not supported by returned signals or supported action evidence.

If no supported admin action is returned or triggered, saying no supported action is available is acceptable; penalize that only when deterministic action evidence shows at least one supported action exists.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
